Here's the server config, the classic case that motivated this whole roadmap: 
Property   | Value
-----------+----------------------------------
CPU model  | Intel Xeon E5-2697A v4 @ 2.60 GHz
vCores     | 5
Arch       | x86_64 (64-bit)
Hypervisor | KVM / QEMU
A 3-column table with right-aligned numbers: 
Day | Tokens in | Tokens out
----+-----------+-----------
Mon | 1,234     | 2,345
Tue | 4,567     | 5,678
